intro: Over 20 articles published between April 13 and April 30, 2026, covered privilege-escalation vulnerabilities, with 17 high-severity incidents and 2 critical cases. Threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was observed in these attacks. The top CVEs included CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1), CVE-2026-5490 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-6406 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-25203 (CVSS 7.8), and CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8). Affected sectors spanned technology, education, enterprise, and healthcare, with global and North American regions impacted.
